inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Question / Prompt
inputs.description: Question to ask about the image.

inputs.name: image
inputs.label: Image Path or Data URI
inputs.description: Wire from a Screenshot or Camera Capture node, or provide a file path.

inputs.name: model
inputs.label: Model Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured model at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Analysis
outputs.description: AI-generated description or answer about the image.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the image analysis failed.

properties.label: System Prompt
properties.default: You are a helpful vision assistant.
